statement: The function checks if the window is not empty (a < b) before proceeding.
The function checks if the new window overlaps with any existing timeline entries.
If the start of the window is greater than or equal to the end, a ValueError exception is raised.

condition: any((not (b <= s or a >= e) for s, e in timeline))
statement: If there is any overlap between the new window and existing timeline entries, the function returns False.
